nodes.name: EN
nodes.summary: EN表示 IUCN 濒危等级，当前关联384种鸟类，如朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭、黑脸琵鹭等384种鸟类。

nodes.name: 嘈雜藪鳥
nodes.summary: 嘈雜藪鳥（Noisy scrubbird，学名 Atrichornis clamosus），在图谱中标记为濒危（EN）物种，主要威胁包括气候变化。

nodes.name: 气候变化
nodes.summary: 长期改变水文节律与生态系统稳定性的全球变化因素。

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The noisy scrubbird is listed on the IUCN Red List as an endangered species. The species was presumed extinct when Edwin Ashby searched unsuccessfully at Ellensbrook (Margaret River) in 1920, although he noted a report by a resident of its call and movements in deep karri forest and anticipated it would be rediscovered in similar habitat. thumb|Memorial to "Atrichornis clamosus, a sweet voiced bird of the scrub" at Drakes Brook (Waroona). The populations of the noisy scrubbird are declining despite 50 years of conservation and management. Major threats include forest fires, predation by introduced species such as foxes, feral cats and black rats, degradation of habitat, soil fungi, introduced mammals, climate change and lack of genetic variation
